diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support, this is Rhea. How can I help?
[Caller] Hi. I did something really dumb. I meant to pull on the character banner and I hit Standard Wish by accident. I burned 10 Acquaint Fates on it. Can anything be done?
[Agent] Oh no — that's a sinking feeling, I know. Let me verify your account and take a look. UID?
[Caller] 704582103. Email srodriguez at email dot com.
[Agent] Thank you, Sofia. Verified. I can confirm the wishes on the Standard Wish banner. I want to be straightforward with you — per our policy, wishes are final once confirmed, and pulls can't be transferred between banners. I can't reverse those 10 wishes. But I also don't want you to leave the call feeling like there's nothing you can do.
[Caller] I appreciate you being honest.
[Agent] Of course. Here's what I can do — and what I always share with players who land in this spot. First, those 10 Standard Wishes all contributed to your Standard Wish pity counter, so they weren't wasted in the long run — you are 10 pulls closer to a guaranteed Standard 5-star, which is actually a great pool of characters. Second, I'm going to turn on an in-game safety prompt for you that flashes a confirmation screen before any wish on any banner. It'll stop the muscle-memory mistake from happening again.
[Caller] That would honestly save me next time, yes.
[Agent] Done. One more thing — while we're here, do you want me to walk you through the Standard Banner soft-pity behavior? It's the same math as the Event Wish, but on a separate counter.
[Caller] Yes please.
[Agent] Great. Starting at pull 75 on the Standard Wish, your 5-star rate climbs significantly until the hard guarantee at pull 90. Characters in the Standard pool are Keqing, Jean, Qiqi, Tighnari, Dehya, Mona, and Diluc. All strong. You never know what you'll get, and a lot of players consider the Standard Banner pulls a nice surprise.
[Caller] That's actually reassuring. Thanks for taking the time.
[Agent] My pleasure, Sofia. Anything else?
[Caller] No, that's plenty.
[Agent] Safe travels in Teyvat!
